title: linaria salangensis
intro: Linaria salangensis, also known as Salangense Toadflax, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It is traditionally used in Korean medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. Linaria salangensis can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, allowing its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
